cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, is this Tanvi Chopra? Sir, I'm calling from Zoom regarding the support ticket you filed, ticket number ZM12345. How are you today, ji?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, that's me. I'm doing well, thank you. What's the status on my issue?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, great to hear that! I'd be happy to help you with that. Can you please tell me what operating system you're using, and what version of Zoom you have installed? This will help me troubleshoot the issue.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 45s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.
